chapters.title: Chapter 1 Practical Guide
chapters.markdown:
# Chapter 1 Practical Guide

This guide introduces a practical method for reading institutional change.

The chapter offers a tool, a practice, a case, and an action sequence.

It is useful as orientation, but the later chronology changes the book's emphasis.

A reader should treat the method as a frame for historical interpretation.

chapters.title: Appendix: Chronology
chapters.markdown:
# Appendix: Chronology

1900: The first public institution is founded.

1910: A reform movement changes the public role of the institution.

1925: A later committee publishes evidence that reframes the earlier reform.
